canonicalZones.name: published-docs
canonicalZones.description: Published documentation source for GitHub Pages.

canonicalZones.name: public-assets
canonicalZones.description: Public-safe logos, media, downloads, and certificate assets.

canonicalZones.name: public-evidence-thumbnails
canonicalZones.description: Public evidence thumbnails and visual summaries.

canonicalZones.name: site-entrypoints
canonicalZones.description: GitHub Pages entry pages at repository root.

canonicalZones.name: repo-control-files
canonicalZones.description: Repository control files and policy documentation.

generatedZones.name: docs-assets-mirror
generatedZones.description: Generated documentation asset mirror used for compatibility.

generatedZones.name: audit-outputs
generatedZones.description: Generated audit, exposure, and repository inventory artifacts.

immutableArchiveZones.name: legacy-source-exports
immutableArchiveZones.description: Historical source exports and legacy documentation snapshots.

immutableArchiveZones.name: approved-archive
immutableArchiveZones.description: Explicitly archived content approved for preservation.

immutableArchiveZones.name: validation-archives
immutableArchiveZones.description: Historical validation snapshots kept for provenance.

immutableArchiveZones.name: legacy-cdn-artifacts
immutableArchiveZones.description: Legacy Cloudflare artifact tree preserved as a historical deployment artifact.

remediationExclusions.description: Never apply automatic remediation to protected archive or evidence zones unless an explicit override flag is supplied.

orphanSuppressionRules.name: historical-export-exception
orphanSuppressionRules.reason: Historical exports and mirrors are preserved even when they have low or no live inbound references.

orphanSuppressionRules.name: evidence-exception
orphanSuppressionRules.reason: Evidence assets are intentionally preserved as portfolio proof and may be referenced indirectly.

orphanSuppressionRules.name: downloadable-artifact-exception
orphanSuppressionRules.reason: Downloadable artifacts are retained for provenance, evidence, or recruiter review.

orphanSuppressionRules.name: explicit-allowlist
orphanSuppressionRules.reason: Repository policy and governance docs are intentionally present even when they have sparse inbound links.

duplicateSuppressionRules.name: canonical-source
duplicateSuppressionRules.description: Prefer canonical public source locations over mirrors and archive copies.

duplicateSuppressionRules.name: generated-derivative
duplicateSuppressionRules.description: Treat generated mirrors and reports as derivatives of the canonical source.

duplicateSuppressionRules.name: historical-archive-duplicate
duplicateSuppressionRules.description: Archive duplicates are retained for lineage and provenance.
